flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Wright State University-Main Campus fell 82% between 2006 and 2009 (19.0% → 3.4%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 20% at Wright State University-Main Campus vs the 2018–2022 baseline (6.3k vs 8.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wright State University-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).
